description_long: This is a rugged, low-cut athletic shoe designed for urban environments, featuring a robust dark gray rubber sole and reinforced toe cap for durability. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays, providing breathability and structural support. Distinctive white chevron-like patterns are visible on the side panels, adding a dynamic visual element. The shoe is equipped with a standard criss-cross lacing system, black laces, and a padded collar with an orange inner lining for comfort. A pull tab is present at the heel for easy wearing. The overall design suggests a focus on both functionality and style, suitable for walking or light outdoor activities.
description: A sturdy, dark gray athletic shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, white chevron side accents, and a reinforced sole. Features include black laces, orange inner lining, and a heel pull tab.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white chevron patterns, mesh panels, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar, orange inner lining, and heel pull tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar chevron accents and visible lacing system.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe, lacing system, and mesh upper.
